title: Simplex 借助 Codex 重新思考软件开发
title_en: Simplex rethinks software development with Codex
summary: Simplex 利用 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 加速软件开发，将设计、构建和测试时间缩短，并扩展 AI 驱动的工作流。Simplex boosts software development with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex, reducing design, build, and testing time while scaling AI-driven workflows.
